reviewChecklist: Inspect the vendored transport diff after every sync.
Adapt src/lib/gateway/hermes.ts when the upstream client API changes.
Adapt src/lib/gateway/tauri-gateway-socket.ts and src-tauri/src/lib.rs when upstream transport behavior changes.
Run the focused upstream-sync contract test and the standard validation stack before opening a PR.

transport.description: Hermes JSON-RPC transport files mirrored into the BITCH renderer.
transport.cadence: Run monthly and immediately after upstream Hermes gateway/shared transport changes.

types.description: Future mirrored Hermes desktop/shared TypeScript types. Keep this group empty until a local file intentionally mirrors upstream type definitions.
types.cadence: Run alongside the transport sync whenever TypeScript type mirrors are registered.
